_notes.keys: IP or MAC (case-insensitive). IP is matched first, then MAC.
_notes.role: server-ish roles (server, fileserver, nas, infra, router, gateway, switch, hypervisor, dc) suppress 'management interface on a non-server' findings
_notes.usage: copy to reports/asset_tags.json, or pass --tags-file / set it in the web Output panel
